code_prompt_defaults.object_description_segment_set: reference segment AB and six other unlabeled segments
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_line_points: labeled points A and B plus unlabeled dot points
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_quadrant_points: one X-marked reference point and unlabeled dot points
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_polygon_lattice: one polygon drawn on graph paper
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_segment_endpoints: set "annotation" to an array of segments, where each segment is [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] for one non-AB segment satisfying the question
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_collinear_pixel_point_se: set "annotation" to an array of every pixel point [x,y] for the dot points that lie on the same line as A and B
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_quadrant_pixel_point_set: set "annotation" to an array of every pixel point [x,y] that lies in the same quadrant as the marked point
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_pixel_point_set: set "annotation" to an array containing every pixel point [x,y] for each integer lattice point that lies strictly inside the polygon
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_integer: set "answer" to the integer count requested by the question

parallel_count: How many other segments are parallel to segment AB?
Count the other segments that are parallel to segment AB.
Use segment AB as the reference. How many other segments are parallel to it?
How many other segments have the same slope as segment AB?
Count the segments, excluding AB itself, that are parallel to segment AB.
perpendicular_count: How many other segments are perpendicular to segment AB?
Count the other segments that are perpendicular to segment AB.
Use segment AB as the reference. How many other segments are perpendicular to it?
How many other segments form a right angle with segment AB?
Count the segments, excluding AB itself, that are perpendicular to segment AB.
collinear_count: How many dot points lie on the same line as points A and B?
Count the dot points that are collinear with points A and B.
Using A and B as the reference line, how many dot points lie on that same line?
How many dot points lie on the line through A and B?
Count the dot points, excluding A and B themselves, that lie on the same line as A and B.
same_quadrant_count: How many dot points lie in the same quadrant as the X-marked point?
Count the dot points that are in the same quadrant as the marked X point.
How many dot points lie in the same quadrant as the X-marked point?
Ignoring the marked X point itself, how many dot points lie in its quadrant?
Count the dot points that share a quadrant with the X-marked point.
point_in_shape_count: How many integer lattice points lie strictly inside the shown polygon?
Count the integer graph-paper points that are strictly inside the polygon.
How many integer lattice points are strictly inside the polygon?
Count the integer lattice points that lie inside the polygon, not on its boundary.
How many integer graph-paper points lie in the interior of the polygon?
